assistant.title: Ask Your Assistant
assistant.exampleQuery: Where can I find the best Macchiato near Piazza right now?
assistant.exampleResponse: Based on recent community reviews, **Tomoca Coffee** on Churchill Ave is currently the top-rated spot. It's only 450m away and usually less crowded at this hour!
assistant.label: Gemini Assistant

community.exampleQuestion: "Is there a designated parking area for visitors near the Friendship Park main gate?"

navigation.title: Empowering Your Local Journey
navigation.description: Navigate with precision using digital addresses for everyday spots, from hidden cafes to local markets. Our platform bridges the gap between traditional landmarks and digital maps.
features: Search by local landmarks or Amharic names

accuracy.title: Crowdsourced Accuracy
accuracy.description: Every spot on Yet Bota is verified by the community. We use a multi-step verification process where locals confirm locations, upload photos, and update business hours in real-time.

gamification.title: Gamified Community
gamification.description: Every contribution counts. Earn points, unlock exclusive badges, and climb the leaderboard as you help map Ethiopia. From 'Newbie Explorer' to 'Legendary Guide', your impact is recognized.

principles.title: Core Principles
principles.subtitle: Why thousands of Ethiopians trust Yet Bota every day

items.title: By the People
items.description: Built and updated by a passionate community of local guides who know their neighborhoods best.

items.title: AI-Verified
items.description: Community data is cross-referenced with satellite imagery and AI models to ensure 99.9% coordinate accuracy.

items.title: No Hidden Fees
items.description: Free for users and small local vendors. Our goal is accessibility for all Ethiopian businesses.

items.title: Digital 2030 Aligned
items.description: Directly contributing to Ethiopia's digital transformation strategy for local commerce and navigation.

champions.title: Community Champions
champions.subtitle: The heroes mapping Ethiopia's digital future

footer.tagline: Community-contributed location discovery platform aligned with Ethiopia's Digital 2030 strategy.
